title: hieracium kuekenthalianum subsp. trivialiforme
intro: Hieracium kuekenthalianum subsp. trivialiforme, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hieracium kuekenthalianum subsp. trivialiforme include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential medicinal applications.
